visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A middle-aged man with glasses, a grey flat cap, and a white sweatshirt featuring a dog graphic sits at a white table. He gesturs with his hands, which are adorned with beaded bracelets and a yellow smartwatch. Two smartphones rest on the table before him against a background of grey vertical curtains. (2) A close-up view shows two hands carefully inserting a SIM card into the blue side of a smartphone. A metal SIM ejector tool lies on the table nearby. (3) The screen transitions to a side-by-side comparison of two mobile phone screen recordings. Speed test applications are running, showing fluctuating gauges and numerical data on dark interfaces. (4) The man returns to the frame, holding two smartphones in his hands—one white and one light blue—showing their back designs to the camera while speaking. (5) A final close-up of the white smartphone is shown as the man emphasizes a point with a hand gesture, with light studio lighting illuminating the scene.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: 3c有趣意tim哥 @3ctim. [Slogan]: 這次蘋果 iPhone16e. (2) [Slogan]: 換上 C1 晶片. (3) [Slogan]: 自研的 5G 的 晶片. (4) [Subtitle]: 首先我們先裝上. [Slogan]: 同一家的電信公司. (5) [Slogan]: 同一個 5G 的方案. (6) [Slogan]: 第一次測速. [Variety]: iPhone16e 479 114, iPhone16 291 102. (7) [Slogan]: 第2次測速 第3次測速 第4次測速 第5次測速. (8) [Variety]: iPhone16e 377 58.5, iPhone16 276 91.5. (9) [Slogan]: 室內測不準 我們去室外. (10) [Slogan]: iPhone16e 148 30.8, iPhone16 161 21.2. (11) [Subtitle]: 續航力也增加了兩個小時! [Slogan]: 在16e上.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: One main male tech reviewer present throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A middle-aged man wearing a white 'Roots' sweatshirt with a dog illustration, a grey checkered flat cap, glasses, a yellow-banded smartwatch, and beaded bracelets.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A clean indoor studio with grey vertical blinds, a white desk, and later digital screen captures of mobile OS interfaces and speed test apps.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-clarity male narration begins, speaking with a friendly and informative tone over an upbeat acoustic guitar-driven BGM. (2) A subtle mechanical click is heard during the SIM card insertion scene, followed by a light whoosh sound effect for the transition. (3) The narration continues with steady tempo, explaining technical data results while the music maintains a consistent, joyful major-mode rhythm. (4) A soft 'pop' sound effect highlights a text overlay. (5) The narrator's pitch rises slightly in excitement towards the end while discussing battery performance. The audio concludes with a clean fade-out of the music track.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Technical Comparison -> Empirical Evidence -> Feature Highlight -> Summary
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to inform viewers about the performance and efficiency of Apple's new in-house C1 chip in the iPhone 16e by comparing its 5G speeds and battery life against the standard iPhone 16.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video focuses on a specific new product model (iPhone 16e), highlighting its technical improvements and benefits in a structured review format typical of tech influencers.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A highly professional and data-driven short-form tech review that uses split-screen results to build credibility.
